Sienna Senior Living ( (TSE:SIA) ) has issued an update.

Sienna Senior Living has been recognized for the sixth consecutive year in The Globe and Mail’s Women Lead Here benchmark, underscoring its leadership in executive gender diversity within Canada’s senior and retirement living sector. The company is one of only 85 out of 500 large publicly traded Canadian companies highlighted for best-in-class representation of women in executive roles.

Women hold 50% of Sienna’s senior executive positions, above the benchmark average, and approximately 70% of its broader leadership identifies as women, supporting an inclusive culture and talent pipeline. Management links this leadership diversity to 12 straight quarters of organic growth and a roughly 30% expansion of its platform in 2025, as Sienna enters a multi-year growth phase approaching $1 billion in new long-term care and retirement assets since early 2025.

The recognition reinforces Sienna’s positioning as a growth-oriented operator benefiting from strong sector fundamentals, disciplined capital allocation, and consistent execution. For stakeholders, the blend of sustained operational momentum and deep female representation in leadership suggests continued focus on governance, culture, and strategic expansion across its long-term care and Aspira Retirement Living portfolio.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:SIA) stock is a Buy with a C$26.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Sienna Senior Living stock, see the TSE:SIA Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on SIA Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SIA is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak cash flow and elevated leverage despite improving profitability. Offsetting that, technicals are favorable with a strong uptrend, and the earnings call reinforced solid operating momentum and liquidity. Valuation is mixed: an attractive yield, but a high P/E limits upside support.

To see Spark’s full report on SIA stock, click here.

More about Sienna Senior Living

Sienna Senior Living Inc. is one of Canada’s leading owners and operators of senior living communities, offering a full range of options including independent living, assisted living, memory care under its Aspira retirement brand, long-term care, and specialized seniors’ programs. The company employs approximately 15,000 people who serve more than 13,000 seniors across Canada, with a workforce that reflects the diversity of the communities it serves and a strong representation of women at all levels of leadership.

data.title: BlackRock Trimmed Direct Voting Stake in OMV Below 4%
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from OMV AG ( (DE:OMV) ) is now available.

BlackRock, Inc. has notified OMV that its total holding of voting rights in the Austrian energy group has fallen slightly, with voting rights attached to shares now at 3.68% and additional rights via financial instruments bringing its overall position to 4.3%. The disclosure was triggered as BlackRock’s voting rights attached to shares dropped below the 4% threshold, signaling a marginal reduction in the asset manager’s direct equity influence over OMV while it maintains exposure through instruments such as American Depositary Receipts, securities lending and CFDs.

The change in BlackRock’s stake is modest and does not fundamentally alter OMV’s shareholder structure, but it is relevant for investors monitoring shifts among major institutional holders in a heavily regulated European energy stock. The notification underscores the role of large global asset managers in OMV’s free float and highlights ongoing portfolio adjustments that can affect liquidity, governance dynamics and market perception, even when percentage moves are small.

The most recent analyst rating on (DE:OMV) stock is a Hold with a EUR66.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on OMV AG stock, see the DE:OMV Stock Forecast page.

More about OMV AG

OMV Aktiengesellschaft is an Austria-based integrated oil, gas and chemicals group headquartered in Vienna and listed on the Vienna Stock Exchange. The company is active along the energy value chain, from exploration and production to refining, marketing and petrochemicals, with a strategic focus on European and international markets.

data.description:

Rapid Dose Therapeutics Corp ( (TSE:DOSE) ) has shared an announcement.

Rapid Dose Therapeutics Corp. has announced it will pay the March 31, 2026 quarterly interest on its amended and restated secured convertible notes by issuing common shares instead of cash. The notes, originally created through a 2023 private placement financing of over $3.1 million and later extended to November 30, 2026 with 18% annual interest payable in shares, will result in the issuance of 1,263,001 shares at $0.11 each to satisfy approximately $138,932 of accrued interest, with the new shares subject to a four-month hold period.

The move underscores the company’s continued reliance on equity-based financing to service high-interest debt arising from its prior capital raise, which may help preserve cash for operations while modestly diluting existing shareholders. By extending both the maturity of the notes and the expiry of associated warrants, RDT is effectively managing its near-term liquidity obligations while keeping investors engaged through convertible and warrant-linked upside tied to its drug delivery technology business.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:DOSE) stock is a Hold with a C$0.09 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Rapid Dose Therapeutics Corp stock, see the TSE:DOSE Stock Forecast page.

data.title: Oncolytics Plans FDA Meeting for Pelareorep SCAC Study
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Oncolytics Biotech ( (ONCY) ) is now available.

On April 6, 2026, Oncolytics Biotech announced it had scheduled a Type C meeting with the U.S. Food and Drug Administration for April 16, 2026, to discuss a potential single-arm registrational study of pelareorep plus a checkpoint inhibitor in second-line and later squamous cell anal carcinoma. The proposed pivotal trial would enroll about 60 to 70 patients who have exhausted approved therapies, using objective response rate as the primary endpoint to support a potential full approval in a setting with significant unmet medical need.

The company highlighted that pelareorep combined with a checkpoint inhibitor produced roughly a 30% objective response rate and a 17-month median duration of response in late-line SCAC patients in the GOBLET study, comparing favorably with real-world response rates of 10–14% and a 9.5-month median duration. Management framed the FDA discussion as a critical step toward a clearer and potentially more efficient approval pathway in a rare cancer where global incidence is about 54,000 cases annually and the anal cancer market is projected to roughly double to $2.3 billion between 2025 and 2035.

The most recent analyst rating on (ONCY) stock is a Hold with a $0.92 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Oncolytics Biotech stock, see the ONCY Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on ONCY Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ONCY is a Neutral.

Overall score reflects weak financial fundamentals (no revenue, ongoing losses/cash burn and negative equity) and bearish technicals (below key moving averages with negative MACD). These are partially offset by favorable corporate events, including FDA Fast Track designation and continued clinical progress for pelareorep.

To see Spark’s full report on ONCY stock, click here.

More about Oncolytics Biotech

Oncolytics Biotech Inc. is a clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on developing pelareorep, an intravenously delivered double-stranded RNA immunotherapeutic agent designed to convert immunologically “cold” tumors “hot” by activating innate and adaptive immune responses. The company is advancing pelareorep in combination with chemotherapy and checkpoint inhibitors in metastatic gastrointestinal cancers, including colorectal and pancreatic cancer where it has U.S. FDA Fast Track designation, and is seeking strategic partnerships to accelerate development and commercialization.

Pelareorep has shown encouraging results in multiple first-line pancreatic cancer trials, two randomized Phase 2 studies in metastatic breast cancer, and early-phase studies in anal and colorectal cancer, positioning Oncolytics within the emerging immuno-oncology and oncolytic virus space. By targeting indications with significant unmet need and limited late-line options, the company is aiming to carve out a differentiated niche in the gastrointestinal cancer market.

Average Trading Volume: 1,370,262

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $111.5M

For an in-depth examination of ONCY stock, go to TipRanks’ Overview page.

Inspira Technologies Oxy BHN ( (IINN) ) has issued an announcement.

On April 6, 2026, Israel‑based Inspira Technologies announced its entry into the quantum computing sector by repurposing its newly acquired additive manufactured electronics platform to develop 3D connectivity architectures for dilution cryostats. The initiative targets interconnect density, thermal load, and electromagnetic crosstalk constraints in a market analysts see growing rapidly, while the company simultaneously keeps pushing commercialization of its INSPIRA ART100 respiratory system and HYLA blood‑monitoring device and plans to seek shareholder approval to rebrand as QTREX Ltd.

Management, including CEO and Nano Dimension co‑founder Dagi Ben‑Noon and COO Avi Shabtay, aims to leverage their prior AME development experience and key personnel from the legacy AME team to ensure a smooth transition and capitalize on existing proof‑of‑concept work in qubit‑related integration. Inspira has already begun exploring collaborations with major quantum industry players, positioning the company to shift its core identity toward quantum connectivity solutions while retaining its healthcare portfolio in a dedicated subsidiary structure.

An update from Perpetua Resources ( (PPTA) ) is now available.

Perpetua Resources said the Board of the Export-Import Bank of the United States has moved a proposed $2.7 billion senior secured long-term loan for the Stibnite Gold Project into a 25-day Congressional notice period, the final step before a board vote. If approved, the roughly $2.2 billion direct loan, together with Perpetua’s $714 million year-end cash balance, would fully cover estimated direct capital costs, as well as certain exploration and corporate expenses, and could enable a final investment decision later this year.

Alongside the financing milestone, Perpetua released an updated Technical Report Summary as of Dec. 31, 2025, showing improved project economics that reinforce Stibnite’s status as a premier gold-antimony asset. At a base case gold price of $3,250 per ounce, the after-tax NPV5 is estimated at $3.5 billion, rising to $6.1 billion and a 32.3% after-tax IRR at $4,500 gold, underscoring the project’s potential value upside and its importance for investors and U.S. critical mineral supply security.

data.title: BTQ study says quantum mining threat to Bitcoin overstated, shifts focus to signature risk
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

BTQ Technologies ( (TSE:BTQ) ) has issued an announcement.

BTQ Technologies has released a research paper on arXiv providing what it calls the first end-to-end physical cost estimate for using quantum computers to mine Bitcoin. The study concludes that even under highly favorable assumptions, quantum-accelerated mining using Grover’s algorithm would demand qubit counts and energy levels comparable to a large national grid, and at current Bitcoin difficulty would require resources approaching the output of a star.

The findings argue that quantum mining is not a credible near-term threat to Bitcoin’s proof-of-work consensus, while underscoring that the more immediate and serious risk lies in quantum attacks on Bitcoin’s elliptic-curve signatures. This distinction supports BTQ’s strategic focus on its Bitcoin Quantum project, which aims to deliver a quantum-safe Bitcoin architecture, and bolsters its long-term case for Quantum Proof of Work, a quantum-native, classically verifiable consensus model positioned as a more realistic and energy-efficient path than trying to speed up legacy mining with quantum hardware.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:BTQ) stock is a Hold with a C$0.09 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on BTQ Technologies stock, see the TSE:BTQ Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on BTQ Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, BTQ is a Neutral.

The score is primarily held back by very weak profitability and materially negative operating/free cash flow despite improving results year over year. A debt-free balance sheet provides some support, but valuation remains constrained by losses and technical signals indicate limited trend strength with extreme momentum readings.

To see Spark’s full report on BTQ stock, click here.

More about BTQ Technologies

BTQ Technologies Corp. is a Vancouver-based quantum technology company listed on Nasdaq and CBOE Canada under the ticker BTQ. The firm focuses on securing mission-critical networks and is developing quantum-safe architectures and consensus mechanisms for Bitcoin and broader digital asset infrastructure.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: C$7.87M

data.title: Innocan Pharma Secures Additional Insider Debenture Ahead of Planned U.S. Offering
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from InnoCan Pharma ( (TSE:INNO) ).

Innocan Pharma has closed an additional US$200,000 secured debenture financing with its largest shareholder, Tamar Innovest Ltd., following a prior US$450,000 debenture completed in March 2026. The new debenture bears 10% annual interest and will mature either within 12 months or upon completion of Innocan’s planned U.S. public offering, bolstering short-term liquidity as the company advances its capital markets strategy.

Because Tamar Innovest is an insider controlled by Innocan director Ralph Bossino, the transaction qualifies as a related-party deal under Canadian securities rules, but the company is relying on exemptions from valuation and minority approval as the debenture size is below 25% of its market capitalization. The financing, approved by independent directors, underscores continued insider support while potentially raising governance attention given the reliance on related-party funding to bridge Innocan’s operations toward a prospective U.S. listing.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:INNO) stock is a Sell with a C$6.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on InnoCan Pharma stock, see the TSE:INNO Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on INNO Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, INNO is a Neutral.

The score is driven primarily by mixed financials: a solid, low-leverage balance sheet and improved 2025 cash flow are offset by continued net losses and a cooling revenue trajectory. Technical indicators add downside pressure (below key long-term moving averages and negative MACD), while valuation is limited by negative earnings and no stated dividend yield.

To see Spark’s full report on INNO stock, click here.

More about InnoCan Pharma

Innocan Pharma is an innovator in the pharmaceuticals and wellness sectors, developing a CBD-loaded liposome drug delivery platform designed for precise, prolonged release of synthetic CBD for non-opioid pain management. The company also markets a broad range of high-performance self-care and beauty products through its 60%-owned subsidiary BI Sky Global Ltd., which specializes in advanced, targeted online sales.
